supported_devices: grow lights (HID/LED, up to 512), HVAC, mini-split AC, dehumidifiers, humidifiers, CO2 generators, CO2 regulators, programmable timer devices
compatible_ec_fans: any 0-10V EC fans (via VFSC-1 variable fan speed controller station accessory)
compatible_lights: any (via LMA series lighting adapters supporting analog 0-10V, RJ14/RJ45 digital protocols)
compatible_sensors: TrolMaster 3-in-1 MBS sensor (temp/humidity/light), CO2 sensor, smoke detector (up to 20), water detector
compatible_humidifiers: any commercial humidifier/dehumidifier (via relay device stations)
compatible_co2_equipment: any CO2 generator or regulator (via relay device stations)
recommended_use_note: Single-zone professional environment controller for grow rooms. Wired Ethernet only (no built-in WiFi). Requires TrolMaster device stations for each controlled device type. Micro-SD card enables offline data logging.
uvp_notes: German retailer price incl. 19% VAT. world-of-grow.de lists at €480. No official manufacturer UVP published.
notes: SKU: HCS-1. Entry-level Hydro-X controller. 128×128 LCD display (6-button interface, no touchscreen). Input 100–240VAC/0.2A. Max 512 lights, 4 temperature devices, 2 humidity devices, 2 CO2 devices, 9 programmable timer devices, up to 20 smoke detectors. Max cable distance 300m. Connects via wired Ethernet only; HughesNet/Viasat satellite incompatible. TM+ smartphone app for remote monitoring.
